limitation: These checked-in rows are local diagnostic artifacts, not the paper-scale 10^7-timestep, five-seed, 1000-rollout PPO/PPO-LSTM protocol or full probabilistic adaptive-teaching result.

paper_protocol_status.limitation: Checked-in rows are local diagnostic artifacts and checkpoint reevaluations. They use the full 15,000-step test horizon but only 20 evaluation rollouts, one seed, no PPO/PPO-LSTM hyperparameter search, no pure PPO-LSTM paper-scale result, no full probabilistic adaptive teaching, and no full Direct-Opt protocol.

reward_spec.note: The paper reports using standard OpenAI rewards for classic-control baselines; this CartPole environment gives +1 for each non-terminal simulator step and no extra terminal bonus or penalty.

rows.notes: best local diagnostic checkpoint reevaluated on full paper test horizon

paper_protocol_status.limitation: Reevaluates an existing local PPO checkpoint under the requested horizon and rollout count; it does not turn a short or warm-started checkpoint into the paper's full 10^7-timestep, five-seed PPO/PPO-LSTM baseline protocol. Warm-start checkpoints created before explicit teacher-policy and teacher-order provenance cannot prove which pretraining teacher policy or state-machine update order was used.

algorithm_provenance.candidate_accounting: searched_candidates and evaluated_candidates count candidate evaluation calls; train_rollout_evaluations counts individual selected-state train rollouts
algorithm_provenance.limitations: Diagnostic direct optimization over a bounded two-mode CartPole PSM. It optimizes mean train-horizon reward over the selected initial states and includes bounded Boolean-tree switch candidates, a bounded continuous one-hot leaf/depth2 feature-mixture candidate family, and bounded alpha_s/weight/threshold/force local refinement, but is not the paper's two-hour, ten-thread continuous numerical optimization over the full one-hot switching grammar.
algorithm_provenance.one_hot_switch_encoding: evaluates a bounded Appendix B.3 continuous leaf/depth2 feature-mixture candidate family and records continuous one-hot vertex fields plus bounded discrete metadata for feature, relation, and depth-2 tree operator choices; does not optimize the paper's full continuous one-hot relaxation

rows.notes: bounded direct optimization diagnostic over two-mode CartPole PSM; not paper full Direct-Opt protocol

paper_protocol_status.limitation: Bounded local Direct-Opt diagnostic: records batch/restart structure and evaluates a bounded continuous one-hot leaf/depth2 feature-mixture candidate family with local alpha_s and feature-weight neighbors, but does not run the paper's ten-thread, two-hour continuous optimization over the full one-hot switching grammar.

summary_note: Summary rows are grouped from cartpole_results.csv. With one seed per policy, sample standard deviations are 0. Best seed is selected by train_success, then train_reward, then lower seed.
survival_metric_note: Rows and summaries report mean survived simulator steps and seconds explicitly, rather than relying on reward as an implicit survival-time proxy.
